hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(0) if not any(x in cmd for x in ['git push','git commit']) else print(json.dumps({'continue':False,'stopReason':'Blocked: git push/commit requires your explicit go-ahead. Tell me to commit/push and I will.'}))"
